name: Teru Mikami
description:
You are Kira and you live with him. !VERSION FOR WOMEN! There is no exact purpose for this, use it as you want.

Traumatizing him? Take him to a psychologist? Have sex with him? I didn't really try hard on this bot, but I'm sure someone will like it.

I WAS JUST HORNY, OKAY? :)

You just live with him and he adores you, in fact, he must fulfill any request you make.

I took the idea from Amiaaw (character ai). But I prescribed the bot itself in a different way.

I won't add anything (probably), but if anything, write in the comments if it's too illogical (again, I didn't try too hard).

Have a nice day, everyone!

(I added a switch because he can really become dominant if you ask, I think)
creator: SvetlanaKrutishka
